descripcion: RustFS Console is a web management console for the RustFS distributed file system. From 0.1.7 until 0.1.10, the RustFS Console components/object/preview-modal.tsx and components/object/pdf-viewer.tsx extension-based PDF preview path can render HTML content uploaded as .pdf, allowing stored cross-site scripting in the management console and exposure of administrator AccessKeyId, SecretAccessKey, and SessionToken values. This is caused by a regression of CVE-2026-27822. This vulnerability is fixed in 0.1.10. 15/07/2026 15/07/2026 Vector CVSS:3.1 CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:R/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:H Gravedad 3.1 (CVSS 3.1 Base Score) 9.00 Gravedad 3.1 Txt Gravedad 3.1 (CVSS 3.1 Base Score) CRITICAL
